[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100000010 2
1 0000110100 3
2 0111011010 6
3 1111101111 9
4 1110001000 4
5 1010111010 6
6 1000001001 3
7 1111111101 9

01 10 1111111111 a
12 21 0101110111 7
23 32 0111110111 8
34 43 0111111110 8
45 54 1011111111 9
56 65 1111011011 8
67 76 1111111101 9 match 7
70 07 1111111101 9 match 7

02 20 1111101101 8
13 31 0111110111 8
24 42 0111101111 8
35 53 1111110111 9
46 64 0111111110 8
57 75 1111111111 a
60 06 1111111101 9 match 7
71 17 1111111111 a

03 30 1111111111 a
14 41 0011111111 8
25 52 1101010111 7
36 63 0111111110 8
47 74 1111111111 a
50 05 1111111111 a
61 16 0111111111 9
72 27 1111111101 9 match 7

04 40 1111101111 9 match 3
15 51 1001110111 7
26 62 0111011101 7
37 73 1111111111 a
